## Checklist

- [ ] The new entry follows the format in `CONTRIBUTING.md` (short name → authors → venue year → one-line contribution → links).
- [ ] I placed the entry in the correct file and sub-section.
- [ ] All links work and point to the canonical source.
- [ ] If I updated the English README, I also updated `README_zh.md` (or the change does not affect it).
- [ ] I am adding a paper, not a promotional link; it has an arXiv / venue citation trail.
